purpose: Probe whether an explicit worker-RPC retry anchor can sustain a thesis-grade worker-channel action better than the older forced-close-only slot.

cases.eligibility_note: Worker-RPC retry redesign candidate. This anchor names the failing worker endpoint directly instead of relying on a generic socket-reader forced-close line.
